name: ADA
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This documentation presents a comprehensive overview of the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) and the corresponding Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) improvements implemented at Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify). The primary goal of these enhancements is to ensure that our digital content is accessible to all users, including those with disabilities, thereby promoting inclusivity and compliance with legal standards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This document details the specific ADA-related enhancements undertaken, their rationale, and their alignment with WCAG principles. It outlines the steps taken to ensure compliance with legal standards, safeguarding the rights of individuals with disabilities and fostering a more inclusive digital environment."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Scope of Work", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#scope-of-work", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The improvements focused on enhancing the accessibility of key pages within our digital platform, specifically targeting the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Search Results Page", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0and the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Collections Page", "bold": true}, {"text": ". These high-traffic areas are critical to user experience, making accessibility essential for all users, including those with disabilities."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Improvements Made", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#improvements-made", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following improvements were implemented on the Search Results Page and Collections Page to enhance accessibility and ensure compliance with WCAG guidelines and ADA standards:"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Keyboard Accessibility", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#keyboard-accessibility", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Improved Tab Navigation:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Optimized interactive elements such as links, buttons, and input fields for full accessibility via keyboard navigation."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Focus Indicators:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Added clear visual indicators to show the current focus of the keyboard when navigating through elements."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Screen Reader Enhancements", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#screen-reader-enhancements", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Descriptive ARIA Labels:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Added and refined ARIA attributes to provide descriptive labels for search results, ensuring accurate information conveyance for screen readers."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Live Region Updates:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Implemented ARIA live regions to notify screen reader users of updates or changes to search results dynamically."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Visual Adjustments", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#visual-adjustments", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Contrast Ratio Improvements:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Adjusted text and background colors to meet or exceed WCAG\u2019s minimum contrast ratio requirements for improved readability."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Accessible Forms and Filters", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#accessible-forms-and-filters", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Labeling and Instructions:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Provided clear, descriptive labels and instructions for all form elements, ensuring effective interaction for users with screen readers."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Testing and Validation", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#testing-and-validation", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A range of testing tools and methodologies were employed to ensure that the accessibility improvements met the required standards, including the\u00a0"}, {"text": "WAVE Evaluation Tool", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This is a powerful browser-based tool designed to help developers, designers, and content creators identify and address accessibility issues on web pages. Developed by WebAIM, WAVE provides both automated and manual testing capabilities, making it an essential resource for ensuring compliance with WCAG guidelines and ADA standards."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Key Features of the WAVE Tool:", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#key-features-of-the-wave-tool", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Visual Feedback:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0WAVE highlights accessibility issues directly on the web page, providing visual representations of areas needing improvement."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Automated Testing:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Scans web pages for common accessibility errors, such as missing alt text, low contrast, and improper use of headings."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Manual Testing Support:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Identifies areas requiring human judgment, such as ambiguous link text or color-dependent information."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Detailed Reporting:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Generates comprehensive reports categorizing issues by severity and type, aiding prioritization of fixes."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Integration with Development Workflow:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Available as a browser extension, facilitating quick testing throughout the development process."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Application in the Project:", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#application-in-the-project", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "During the project, WAVE was extensively used to evaluate the accessibility of the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Search Results Page", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0and\u00a0"}, {"text": "Collections Page", "bold": true}, {"text": ", helping identify both overt and subtle accessibility issues."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Contrast Checks:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0WAVE was used to ensure that all text elements on the pages met the required contrast ratios, making content readable for users with visual impairments."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "ARIA Implementation:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0The tool helped verify the correct use of ARIA roles and attributes, ensuring that screen readers could accurately interpret dynamic content and interactive elements."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Form Accessibility:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0WAVE was instrumental in checking that all forms, including search filters and input fields, were properly labeled and accessible to users relying on assistive technologies."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Results", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/ada-compliance#results", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Following the implementation of the accessibility improvements on the Search Results Page and Collections Page, a significant increase in the accessibility score was observed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The enhancements, systematically applied based on WAVE testing, resulted in:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Desktop Accessibility Score:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Increased to\u00a0"}, {"text": "100/100", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Mobile Accessibility Score:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Increased to\u00a0"}, {"text": "100/100", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The increase in accessibility scores reflects a substantial reduction in barriers for users with disabilities, enhancing the usability and inclusivity of the platform. By raising the accessibility score, the platform now meets higher compliance standards and provides a more equitable digital experience for all users, aligning with both WCAG guidelines and ADA requirements."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Before Improvements (Desktop):", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url":
